3135380.name: Verse Project
3135380.description:
Verse Project is an innovative multiplayer space simulator created by a small indie studio Synthes Games, that offers players an unparalleled level of immersion in a detailed and expansive universe.

The game features an accurate simulation of the Solar System at a 1:1 scale, where all planets, moons, and celestial bodies are placed in their real proportions and orbits.

Experience full immersion in a unified game world without loading screens, where thousands of players can interact in real time. Explore the expanse of space, develop your skills, and participate in events that change the dynamics of the universe.

Key Features

Realistic Solar System

Each planet, moon, and asteroid is in its real orbit at a 1:1 scale. Verse Project is a flight simulator in space with close to real physics.

Unified Game World
There are no separate servers or divided worlds — every player coexists in one universe, creating unique stories and affecting the overall picture of events.

Full Immersion
Thanks to the absence of loading screens, transitions between planets, space stations, star fields and ships are instantaneous, enhancing the sense of presence in the vast reaches of space.

Multiplayer Mode
Interact with players around the world, form alliances, wage wars, and trade resources that affect the economy and the universe.

Dynamic Events
The world of the game is constantly changing due to the actions of players, creating an ever-evolving and unpredictable game environment.

Your Journey

Verse Project offers not just the Solar System in real scale, but a new immersive experience where every detail has been thought out to create a sense of reality and depth to the space adventure.

Be ready to meet elite spaceships, which can be dangerous sometimes.

Embark on an epic journey through the cosmos! If you choose a role of space engineers, your mission is to explore, space craft, and survive in the harsh of space frontier.

From trading to deep stellar combat, a universe of opportunities awaits every aspiring citizen of star, moon or a planet.
3135380.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 日语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
